title: Xiphion alatum
taxonomy: Xiphion alatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is a bulbous perennial native to South Africa. The genus Xiphion is a group of flowering plants in the subfamily Ixioideae. The family Iridaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the iris family. Xiphion alatum is often classified as Xiphion 'Alatum' (syn Xiphion elegans subsp. alatum), a synonym of the more commonly known Xiphion elegans.

intro: Xiphion alatum, also known as winged sword lily, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asparagaceae family, characterized by its striking, winged stems and showy white flowers.
